_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Bulge in the area on either side of pubic bone
Pain and discomfort in groin region when coughing, exercising or bending over
A heavy full sensation in the groin
Occasionally, pain and swelling around testicles when the protruding intestine descend into the scrotum

claim.label: Invoice of the Mesh / tacker used

ppd_preauth.q: Clinical notes with detailed history, signs & symptoms, indication for procedure?
Was the Photograph showing hernia / bulge submitted?
Was the patient operated for hernia on same side in past?

cpd_claim.q: Does the intraoperative clinical photograph show presence of Mesh?
Is the Invoice of the Mesh used in the procedure?
Are the Complete operative notes mentioning the detail procedure performed?
Is the Discharge summary with follow-up advise at the time of discharge submitted?
Is the pre-anesthesia check-up report available?

common_queries: Clinical notes missing detailed history, signs & symptoms, or indication for procedure
Photograph showing hernia/bulge missing at pre-authorization
Intraoperative clinical photograph missing or does not show presence of Mesh
Invoice for the mesh used is missing
Patient previously operated for hernia on the same side without adequate justification
No clinical symptom of bulge in the area on either side of pubic bone documented

additional_information.special_empanelment: Laparoscopic facility with trained specialties in laparoscopic surgeries for performing laparoscopic surgeries.
